name: Campaign Rally
text:
Create two 1/1 red Voter creature tokens, then create a Snack token to hand out at the rally. (A Snack is a red artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 1 life.")
Voters you control gain haste until end of turn. The crowd is energized.
flavorText: Doors at six, chanting at seven, small controllable fire at eight.
